center.name: Guinean forest–savanna mosaic
center.summary: Guinean forest–savanna mosaic是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑腹火雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Guinean forest–savanna mosaic, the southern Sahel and northern Sudan (region)
